item.title: Op amps as buffers / voltage followers
item.description: Circuit Op amps Pinouts Op amp Pinout LM741 TL072TL082 TL074TL084LM324 Application notes Supply voltage is important: All tested amps max out at somewhere between 3V and 4V when using a 5V supply. Use 12V and put other components (e.g. Arduino) behind a regulator! When using unipolar (0-12V) supply: LM741 floors at 2V or so – anything below that gets clamped.
